parameters.query:
INSERT INTO clients (client_name, domain, keywords, country, engine)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.clientName }}',
  '{{ $json.domain }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.keywords) }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.country }}',
  '{{ $json.engine }}'
)
RETURNING id, client_name, domain, created_at;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, client_id: $json.id, client_name: $json.client_name, message: 'Client saved successfully' }) }}

meta.description: Receives client data from the RankTracker UI form and saves it to the clients table in PostgreSQL/Supabase.
meta.notes: SETUP: 1) Create a Postgres credential named 'Supabase Postgres' pointing to your Supabase DB. 2) Activate this workflow. 3) Copy the webhook URL into the frontend config.
